scripts.build: npm run build -w @node-kakao/protocol-core && npm run build -w @node-kakao/protocol-profiles && npm run build -w @node-kakao/client-core && npm run build -w @node-kakao/testkit && npm run build -w @node-kakao/transport-node
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @node-kakao/protocol-core && npm run typecheck -w @node-kakao/protocol-core && npm run typecheck -w @node-kakao/protocol-profiles && npm run typecheck -w @node-kakao/client-core && npm run typecheck -w @node-kakao/testkit && npm run typecheck -w @node-kakao/transport-node
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test
